nodes.title: About this blog
nodes.summary: A demo WordPress blog wired to ACT via @act-spec/adapter-wordpress.

nodes.title: How-to
nodes.summary: Walkthroughs for using the adapter and the spec.

nodes.title: Authoring
nodes.summary: Tips on writing well-structured WordPress content for ACT.

nodes.title: Welcome to ACT
nodes.summary: An introduction to publishing your WordPress content as an Agent Content Tree.

nodes.title: What is an Agent Content Tree?
nodes.summary: A two-minute primer on the ACT spec: nodes, summaries, blocks, and how an agent walks them.

nodes.title: Wiring the WordPress adapter
nodes.summary: How the adapter talks to wp/v2/{posts,pages,categories,tags,users} and turns each row into one ACT node.

nodes.title: Why summaries are the product
nodes.summary: If your post excerpts are sloppy, your ACT tree is sloppy. The adapter will not invent excerpts for you.

nodes.title: Running the conformance gate
nodes.summary: Validate every emitted ACT envelope against the spec with @act-spec/validator before you publish.
